name: H & C Bus Line Inc
recent_news: No M&A or operational news located. Yellow Pages confirms a school bus listing at 10 W 169th St, Bronx; no website and only a directory presence found.
fit_notes: Micro-operator (2 employees, ~$79K revenue) at a Bronx residential/commercial block; too small to be a standalone tuck-in but could be a route/contract bolt-on for a NYC-area Summit acquirer if it holds active NYC DOE/private-school contracts.

name: STP Transportation Inc
recent_news: No M&A news. D&B/Yelp confirm a small NY-registered transportation services entity at 601 Surf Ave Apt 4N, Brooklyn (Coney Island), in business since 2007 with ~2 employees and ~$98K revenue. Note: FMCSA 'STP Trans Inc' (USDOT 4006035) is a separate Texas freight carrier and not this company.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Brooklyn micro-operator registered at an apartment address; unlikely to be a credible standalone tuck-in. Only relevant if it holds NYC DOE OPT contracts or private-school routes that could roll into a larger NYC platform.

name: Fortna Transportation Inc
recent_news: Yellow Pages lists Fortna Transportation Inc (80 W Main St, Lebanon, PA 17042) as CLOSED after ~19 years in business. No active website or current operating presence found; Cornwall-Lebanon SD transportation pages do not list Fortna as a current contractor.
fit_notes: Appears defunct/closed; not a viable tuck-in target. Skip unless evidence emerges of a revived or successor entity in the Cornwall/Lebanon PA market.

name: Selby Transportation Corp
recent_news: In 2021 Leesel/Selby Transportation joined Beacon Mobility (Audax Group-backed platform). Now operating as SuperSelby with 150-200 vehicles across Yonkers HQ and a Pelham Bay (Bronx) facility; the Pelham, NY listing at 6 Canal Rd appears to be a satellite yard of the same group.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Selby/Leesel is part of Beacon Mobility (Audax PE-backed), a direct strategic competitor to Summit. Use only as competitive intel / pricing benchmark for the NYC/Westchester market.

name: Marily's School Bus Inc
recent_news: No M&A news. Family-owned Hialeah operator providing K-12 school bus and field-trip service across Miami-Dade and into Broward (Miramar, Pembroke Pines); reportedly in business ~17 years per directory listings. Operating address listed at 10931 W Okeechobee Rd, Unit 202, Hialeah, FL 33018 (registered office) in addition to the 17300 NW 87th Ave address.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned South Florida micro-operator serving private schools across Miami-Dade/Broward. Too small to be a meaningful standalone tuck-in (~1 employee, ~$45K revenue), but could fit as a route/contract bolt-on for a Summit FL platform aggregating private-school transport in Miami-Dade.
